title: taraxacum coreanum
intro: Taraxacum coreanum, also known as the Korean dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, and its health benefits may also include improving liver function and reducing blood sugar levels. Taraxacum coreanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
